title: code-emission umbrella
manager: The tracking umbrella for the entire "turn a verified machine into code" surface — the parent that native emitters, the ecosystem-library adapters (W11.3), fleet-wide typegen (W11.5), and the publish/module bundle (W11.10) all close under. It matters because emission is what carries an FSL machine past its own runtime: the same model-checked source becomes an XState export, a C header, a native stepper, or a published package, each behaviorally certified rather than eyeballed as "looks similar." On its own it ships nothing; its product is a coherent, cross-linked map so the emission children land as one designed system instead of a drawer of unrelated one-off exporters.
